name: Vendor Scorecard
tagline: Dynamic supplier scoring with configurable weights
description: The Vendor Scorecard Agent delivers real-time supplier performance analysis driven by your Business Central data. Configure scoring weights for on-time delivery, quality rejection rates, pricing variance, and responsiveness. The agent generates ranked scorecards, highlights underperformers, flags risk concentrations, and recommends procurement actions — in plain language. Replace your quarterly spreadsheet review with a live, queryable scorecard.

reviews.author: Procurement Lead, Crest Foods
reviews.comment: Finally a supplier view that doesn't require a data analyst to build.

reviews.author: Supply Chain Manager, PacNorth Beverages
reviews.comment: Automated our quarterly vendor reviews entirely. Saves us 2 days per quarter.

reviews.author: VP Operations, Grain & Co.
reviews.comment: Best procurement intelligence tool we have added to BC in years.
